replaceUnsupportedHelp: Replacement is unavailable in export preview or read-only mode; databases, Mermaid diagrams, math formulas, the document title, and text with complex formatting also cannot be replaced
replaceCurrentUnsupported: This match spans complex formatting or read-only content and cannot be replaced directly
replaceAttributeViewUnsupported: Database results support search and highlight only; replacement is not supported
replaceMermaidUnsupported: Mermaid diagrams support search and highlight only; replacement is not supported
replaceModeUnsupported: Replacement is unavailable in export preview or read-only mode
replaceAllConfirm: Replace {count} matches in the current document?
replaceProtyleMissing: Cannot find a writable Protyle editor; replace aborted to keep undo available
selectionOnlyNoScope: Selection-only mode is on, but there is no usable selection
settingsIncludeFoldedBlocksHint: Content inside folded headings cannot be searched
settingsIncludeInlineMemoHint: Matches underline the host text with a yellow/orange dashed line
